notes: Wire diameter (0.025") and material thickness (24Ga) are synergic program inputs set via Left and Right knobs. Gas type shown as Stainless Tri-Mix on polarity/gas screen. SCFH set between 20-30 per instructions. Auto Weld Settings (WFS and Voltage) are derived by the synergic program; if adjusted manually, white mark on line shows recommended setting.

Values shown on Auto Weld Settings LCD example screen: MIG Steel, C25 gas, 0.030" wire, 24Ga material thickness, 121 in/min WFS, 13.8 V. These are the synergic-derived recommended outputs; WFS and Voltage can be manually overridden (white mark indicates recommended setting). Run-In WFS shown as 25, Inductance as 5, Spot Timer as 0.0s. SCFH 20-30 from general gas instructions.
